mapper.update: update synlte.FieldDeterminer set DCHINSENAME = #{dchinseName}, DNAME = #{dname}, MEMO = #{memo}, AUTHOR = #{author}, MODDATE = sysdate, DETERMINERTYPE = #{determinerTypeNum}, VERSIONS = #{versions}, RELEASEDATE = #{releaseDate}, FACTURER = #{facturer}, REG_ORG = #{regOrg}, ON_DATE = #{onDate}, DETERMINERSTATE = #{determinerStateNum} where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{determinerId}) and MODDATE = #{modDate}

update synlte.FieldDeterminer set DETERMINERSTATE = #{state}, MODDATE = sysdate, RELEASEDATE = #{releaseDate} where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id}) and MODDATE = to_date(#{modDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
mapper.select: select count(0) from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id}) and MODDATE = to_date(#{modDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
select distinct dname from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(dname) like upper(concat(#{name},'%'))

select DISTINCT DCHINSENAME as label, determinerId as value from synlte.fielddeterminer where determinerstate = '05'
and upper(DCHINSENAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%')))
